label: 456 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 94–283, title I, § 11190 Stat. 486May 11, 1976
notes: Section, , as added , , , gave Commission additional enforcement authority by providing for disqualification of candidates for Federal office from elections for Federal office for a period of time following a finding by Commission that candidate failed to file a required report.Pub. Savings ProvisionRepeal by not to release or extinguish any penalty, forfeiture, or liability incurred under this section or penalty, with this section or penalty to be treated as remaining in force for the purpose of sustaining any proper action or prosecution for the enforcement of any penalty, forfeiture, or liability, see , set out as a note under .Pub.
